days.title: Arrival in Hong Kong
days.subtitle: First Impressions and Local Delights
localTips: Use the Octopus card for easy transport access and discounts.
Try to visit the local street food stalls in the evening for authentic tastes.
Shop for local snacks and souvenirs in Tsim Sha Tsui for unique gifts.

days.title: Exploring Hong Kong Island
days.subtitle: Iconic Sights and Delicious Eats
localTips: The Peak Tram is a must-ride; try to catch it early to avoid queues.
Don't miss the local egg tarts at Tai Cheong Bakery in Central.
Wear comfortable shoes for walking around the markets in Mong Kok.

days.title: Cultural Immersion in Kowloon
days.subtitle: History and Culinary Exploration

timeline.title: Hotel Check-Out
timeline.detail: Check out from the hotel after breakfast. Ensure to settle any bills and gather all belongings before leaving to start your day in Kowloon.
timeline.mapQuery: Your hotel location, Kowloon, Hong Kong

timeline.title: Breakfast at Australia Dairy Company
timeline.detail: Savor a traditional Hong Kong breakfast at this famous eatery. Enjoy their signature milk toast and scrambled eggs, popular among locals and tourists alike.
timeline.mapQuery: Australia Dairy Company, Kowloon, Hong Kong

timeline.title: Transport to Kowloon Walled City Park
timeline.detail: Take the MTR from Jordan Station to Tung Chung Station, then transfer to a bus for a short ride to Kowloon Walled City Park. Enjoy the local scenery during the transport.
timeline.mapQuery: Jordan Station to Kowloon Walled City Park, Kowloon, Hong Kong

timeline.title: Explore Kowloon Walled City Park
timeline.detail: Wander through this historic park that was once a fortified city. Discover its fascinating history through preserved remnants, beautiful gardens, and informative displays.
timeline.mapQuery: Kowloon Walled City Park, Kowloon, Hong Kong

timeline.title: 📸 Photospot: Kowloon Walled City Remnants
timeline.detail: Capture images of the historical remnants and lush gardens. The juxtaposition of nature amidst history is striking.
timeline.mapQuery: Kowloon Walled City Park, Kowloon, Hong Kong
timeline.tip: Best angle: stand near the entrance. Shoot toward the remains of the watchtower. Best light: morning light.

timeline.title: Lunch at Mak's Noodle
timeline.detail: Indulge in a bowl of wonton noodles at this iconic restaurant. Known for its flavorful broth and handmade noodles, it's a must-try for any foodie.

timeline.title: Visit Hong Kong Museum of History
timeline.detail: Dive deep into Hong Kong's past at this comprehensive museum. Exhibits cover everything from prehistoric times to colonial history, providing an insightful perspective.
timeline.mapQuery: Hong Kong Museum of History, Kowloon, Hong Kong

timeline.title: Transport to Temple Street Night Market
timeline.detail: Hop on the MTR from Tsim Sha Tsui to Jordan Station, then enjoy a short walk to Temple Street Night Market. Prepare for an evening of vibrant sights.
timeline.mapQuery: Tsim Sha Tsui to Temple Street Night Market, Kowloon, Hong Kong

timeline.title: Explore Temple Street Night Market
timeline.detail: Experience the bustling energy of this famous night market. Browse stalls selling everything from street food to souvenirs, capturing the vibrant atmosphere.
timeline.mapQuery: Temple Street Night Market, Kowloon, Hong Kong

timeline.title: Dinner at Temple Street
timeline.detail: Sample authentic Hong Kong street food, such as claypot rice and stinky tofu at the various stalls in Temple Street, rounding up your culinary adventure.
timeline.mapQuery: Temple Street Night Market, Kowloon, Hong Kong

timeline.title: Return to Hotel
timeline.detail: End your day by taking a taxi or MTR back to your hotel. Reflect on the memorable experiences and adventures encountered throughout the day in Kowloon.
timeline.mapQuery: Temple Street Night Market to your hotel location, Kowloon, Hong Kong

localTips: Visit the Walled City Park early in the day for peaceful exploration.
Temple Street Night Market is bustling in the evening; try the street seafood.
Check out the Kowloon City Museum for a look into the area's past.
